steps.name: assert expected textarea to be visible

parameters.name: subject
parameters.value: <textarea class="flex min-h-[60px] w-full rounded-md border border-input bg-transparent px-3 py-2 text-base shadow-sm placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-1 focus-visible:ring-ring disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50 md:text-sm" placeholder="Enter text here"></textarea>
